rulings.Case Title: MARTIN J. COYNE ET AL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A CALIFORNIA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 24, 2015, line 1. Petition for Writ of Mandate Hearing Required = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN F GREENWALD et al VS. STEVEN A MINISINI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint And To Join Necessary Parties
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 24, 2015, line 2. Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to Amend Complaint GRANTED only to the extent Plaintiff is seeking to add an indispensable party per CCP 389(a). No other amendments allowed. Second Amended Complaint shall be filed no later than September 25, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN F GREENWALD et al VS. STEVEN A MINISINI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs? Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And Discovery Stay
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 24, 2015, line 2. Plaintiff's Motion for Protective Order Moot in light of the ruling on the motion for leave to file an amended complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN F GREENWALD et al VS. STEVEN A MINISINI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 24, 2015, line 2. Plaintiff's Motion to Continue Trial GRANTED as follows: trial date is vacated. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 24, 2015, line 3. Defendant Dolmen's Demurrer to Fourth Amended Complaint SUSTAINED. Demurrer to negligence cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to allege facts giving rise to duty of care, including a relationship giving rise to the duty. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the unjust enrichment cause of action, no such cause of action under California law. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAROLINE G. ALLEN ET AL VS. SAMPSON LUNG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 24, 2015, line 4. Defendants' (manager) Demurrer to Complaint SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to (1) allege facts re: Allen' standing; (2) join an indispensable party (no substantive opposition on this issue); and to (3) allege all elements of each cause of action in light of arguments raised by demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CAROLINE G. ALLEN ET AL VS. SAMPSON LUNG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 24, 2015, line 4. Defendants' (owners) Demurrer to Complaint SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to (1) allege facts re: Allen' standing; (2) join an indispensable party (no substantive opposition on this issue); and to (3) allege all elements of each cause of action in light of arguments raised by demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TERRENCE JUNN VS. TIFFANY RAPIER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Enforce The Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment Against Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 24, 2015, line 5. Defendants' Motion to Enforce Settlement Agreement DENIED. Defendants should bring the 7/24/2015 cashier's check to the hearing. Plaintiff should bring the replacement payment to the hearing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MISSION STREET SF, LLC VS. CROWDFLOWER, INC. ET AL (Pltf. 170.6 Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 24, 2015, line 6. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Complaint Continued to October 1, 2015 to be heard in department 302 at 9:30 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. SEAN D CASHEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alt. Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 24, 2015, line 7. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KELVIN NG VS. MAX G CASTELLANOS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday September 24, 2015, line 8. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint Sustained without leave to amend. The landlord is not entitled to terminate tenancy and recover possession per SFRO 37.9(a)(4) under the circumstances of this case. = (501/REQ)
